one_line: AI-generated simulations of the future of evolution — speculative biology, future human evolution, and post-apocalyptic survival on Earth and Mars.
audience: Sci-fi fans, futurism and speculative-evolution enthusiasts, biology nerds, and the 'what if' curiosity crowd that watches creatures/aliens/future-Earth content.
tone: Documentary-grade, ominous, awe-inducing. Think a nature documentary narrated from the year 3000.
hook_templates: In the year 3000, {subject} no longer exists. Here's what replaced it.
This is what humans will look like after {timeframe} on Mars.
Evolution didn't stop. {subject} kept changing — watch.
If {event} happened tomorrow, this is the creature that survives.
Scientists simulated {timeframe} of evolution. The result is terrifying.
What if {animal} had to survive a dead Earth?
The last human on Earth won't look human at all.
Nature built this in the next 10 million years. AI just showed us.
{subject} adapted to {environment}. The result shouldn't be possible.
Earth in 3000 is unrecognizable. Start here.
